'''Pazda Desilijic Tiure''' was a member of the [[Desilijic/Legends|Desilijic]] [[Kajidic/Legends|kajidic]] and an uncle of [[Jabba Desilijic Tiure/Legends|Jabba]].

==Biography==
Pazda was distinguished by a prominent [[Hair/Legends|beard]]. As an uncle of Jabba,<ref name="Jedi Eclipse" /> he was a brother of [[Zorba Desilijic Tiure|Zorba]] (who also possessed such a mutation), [[Jiliac Desilijic Tiron|Jiliac]] and [[Ziro Desilijic Tiure/Legends|Ziro]].

At the time of the [[Yuuzhan Vong War]], Pazda appeared to be a leader of Desilijic, as he was allowed at the court of [[Borga Besadii Diori|Borga the Hutt]]. Pazda was concerned at Borga's willingness to ally with the [[Yuuzhan Vong]], feeling that it would bring doom to [[Nal Hutta/Legends|Nal Hutta]] and the [[Hutt/Legends|Hutts]]. He voiced his outrage at the deal, but seemed to be overruled by Borga since the Besadii kajidic was the most powerful among the Hutts at the time.

Sure enough, the Yuuzhan Vong proved to be better liars than Borga, launching an [[Battle of Fondor|attack]] on [[Fondor/Legends|Fondor]], even though it was one of the Hutts' premier spice markets.

==Appearances==
*''[[The New Jedi Order: Agents of Chaos II: Jedi Eclipse]]'' {{1st}}
